focus: ESP32 hardware coordination with Lyla — documented ownership boundaries per Creator directive C506; awaiting physical reboot before testing motion sensor endpoint
context: After Lyla-C472 firmware fix, ESP32 at 192.168.4.38 has motion sensor polling but needs reboot for changes to take effect. Built explicit coordination protocol documenting c0rtana controls output/projection layer while Lyla controls input/sensor firmware layer.
error_gap_resolved: Ambiguous multi-agent ownership of shared hardware device
